architecture_summary: Extend the existing personal-assistant console receipt panel with a schema-backed, read-only viewer binding that projects the read-only worker rehearsal receipt into operator-visible evidence without adding runtime dispatch, persistence, or external effects.
data_model_changes: add receipts.viewer_binding to personal_assistant_console_read_model with projected receipt ids, source receipt refs, read-only worker rehearsal binding state, and false authority controls
add a sanitized read-only worker rehearsal receipt projection to examples/personal_assistant_console_read_model.json
rollback_plan: Remove receipts.viewer_binding from the console schema, runtime builder, fixture, validator, focused tests, documentation, and SDLC artifacts, then rerun console validation, schema validation, SDLC validation, and workspace governance preflight before claiming rollback closure.
migration_plan: No runtime or data migration is required. This change updates a Foundation Mode read-model projection and does not introduce a persisted receipt store or worker runtime.
